briefs.title: BC Insurance Licensing Exemptions Overhauled — Key Changes Take Effect January 2027
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 246/2025 amends five insurance regulations under the Financial Institutions Act, removing several licensing exemptions (including for credit, travel, and funeral services insurance) and restructuring exemptions around restricted insurance agent licences, effective January 1, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Review your insurance licensing status and exemptions with a compliance advisor before January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC insurance licensing exemption amendments take effect — B.C. Reg. 246/2025
